title: Moving columns from subitems to items
excerpt:
Hello Everyone, It is possible to move a column (for example the date column) from subitems to items? 
Many thanks, 
Alex

posts.author: adamalle39 (Adam Alexandra)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone, It is possible to move a column (for example the date column) from subitems to items?
Many thanks,
Alex

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there! While you won’t be able to convert your subitem column to an item column, you could use the “Show Summary on Parent Item” rollup feature in the subitem column’s settings!

Otherwise, your best option is to create a new item column. Hope this helps!
